description: Install dependencies and verify existing tests pass on the baseline
steps: Run 'npm install' to install all dependencies
Run 'npx jest' to confirm all existing tests pass
Run 'npx tsc --noEmit' to confirm TypeScript compilation succeeds
Run 'npx cdk synth' to confirm CDK synthesis succeeds
acceptance_criteria: TypeScript compilation succeeds with no errors
CDK synthesis produces a valid CloudFormation template
findings: All baseline checks pass. 47 tests pass. NODE_OPTIONS env var needs to be unset before running npm/node commands (has a reference to missing proxy-bootstrap.js). A deprecation warning exists for aws_dynamodb.TableOptions#pointInTimeRecovery but does not affect functionality.
